name: outbound-engine-mcp
description: Outbound Engine MCP for AI agents and creators. One cold-outreach engine, any target: brand deals, UGC, newsletter sponsorships, jobs, podcasts. HOOK/BRIDGE/SOFT-ASK structuring, message auditing, 5-step follow-up ladder, reply playbook, 3-option pricing menu, red-flag detection.
author: Elisabeth Hitz
